get.description: This endpoint redirects the user to the login page.
This endpoint signs out the user and redirects to the signed-out callback URL.

get.summary: Retrieves the claims of the authenticated user.
get.description: This endpoint returns the claims associated with the currently authenticated user.
This endpoint returns a list of pets based on the provided search parameters.

post.description: This endpoint creates a new pet with the provided information.

get.summary: Retrieves a pet by its ID.
get.description: This endpoint returns the details of a pet identified by the provided ID.

put.description: This endpoint updates the information of an existing pet identified by the provided ID.

delete.description: This endpoint deletes an existing pet identified by the provided ID.

post.summary: Transfers a pet to a new owner.
post.description: This endpoint transfers ownership of a pet to another owner.

get.summary: Retrieves vaccine administrations for a pet.
get.description: This endpoint returns all vaccine administrations for the specified pet.

post.summary: Adds a vaccine administration to a pet.
post.description: This endpoint records a vaccine administration for the specified pet.

delete.summary: Removes a vaccine administration from a pet.
delete.description: This endpoint removes a vaccine administration record for the specified pet.

get.description: This endpoint returns a list of all clinics in the system.

post.description: This endpoint allows the creation of a new clinic by providing the necessary details in the request body.

get.summary: Retrieves a clinic by its ID.
get.description: This endpoint returns the details of a specific clinic identified by its unique ID.

put.description: This endpoint allows updating the details of an existing clinic identified by its unique ID.

delete.description: This endpoint allows the deletion of a clinic identified by its unique ID.

post.summary: Adds a veterinarian to a clinic.
post.description: This endpoint allows adding a veterinarian to a specific clinic identified by its unique ID.

delete.summary: Removes a veterinarian from a clinic.
delete.description: This endpoint allows removing a veterinarian from a specific clinic identified by its unique ID.

get.summary: Retrieves dog breed details from external API.
get.description: This endpoint retrieves detailed information about a dog breed using the provided breed ID. Example: /api/dog-breeds/036feed0-da8a-42c9-ab9a-57449b530b13
